Political Views
===============

1. I support a universal basic income
2. Climate change should be the #1 political priority
3. Borders should be more open to immigration
4. Wealthy people should pay significantly more taxes
5. Social media does more harm than good to democracy
6. The state should provide free university education
7. Surveillance cameras in public spaces make us safer
8. Nuclear energy is necessary for a green future
9. Voting should be mandatory for all citizens
10. Corporations have too much political influence
